overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a heavy rainstorm in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. The vehicle travels from a debris-filled paved highway onto desert dirt roads, passing under concrete overpasses while the dashboard HUD displays speed and vehicle status.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along paved highway through debris-filled wasteland, maintaining consistent speed

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with double yellow lines stretching into the distance
scattered rubble and wreckage accumulated along the roadside
tall electrical transmission towers and cables running parallel to the road
dilapidated buildings and industrial wreckage visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: Driving along a rain-slicked paved highway through a desolate post-apocalyptic wasteland littered with debris and ruined industrial structures. Heavy rain creates reflective pools on the asphalt while power lines stretch into the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert dirt road with Joshua trees

events.description: turns off paved highway onto unpaved dirt road at stop sign intersection
completes left turn onto desert dirt path, leaving the paved road behind

agents.ego_description: navigating left turn from highway onto desert dirt road, slowing for the intersection

entered.detail: unpaved desert path with tire tracks through muddy terrain
red octagonal traffic sign at the intersection
distinctive desert trees with spiky branches lining the roadside
sandy and rocky desert landscape with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows to navigate a left turn at a stop sign, transitioning from the paved highway to an unpaved desert dirt road. Joshua trees and sparse desert vegetation begin to appear as the industrial ruins fade into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: driving beneath concrete overpass in desert

events.description: enters shadow beneath large concrete overpass structure
exits overpass back into open rainy desert environment

agents.ego_description: passing under concrete overpass while maintaining speed on the dirt road

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dirt road, the vehicle passes beneath a large concrete overpass that briefly blocks the rain and creates a dark shadow. Upon exiting back into the open, the desert landscape with Joshua trees and distant power lines resumes under the grey stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert dirt road through rocky terrain

events.description: approaches and enters second concrete underpass or tunnel structure
exits covered structure back into open desert landscape

agents.ego_description: driving through brief covered section and continuing across open desert terrain with rocky outcrops

entered.detail: second concrete underpass or short tunnel structure
reddish rock formations and boulders along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and passes through a second concrete underpass structure embedded in rocky terrain. Emerging into the open, the road continues through a rugged desert landscape with Joshua trees, rocky outcrops, and distant ruins visible through the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-drenched wasteland that transitions from a ruined industrial highway into a rugged desert landscape. It begins on a rain-slicked paved road littered with debris and industrial ruins, where heavy precipitation creates reflective pools beneath stretching power lines. As the vehicle slows to navigate a left turn at a stop sign, the asphalt gives way to an unpaved dirt road where Joshua trees and sparse vegetation replace the fading industrial structures. The camera then passes beneath a massive concrete overpass that briefly casts a dark shadow over the vehicle before emerging back into the grey, stormy open. Finally, the journey continues through a second concrete underpass embedded in rocky terrain, opening up into a vista of rocky outcrops and distant ruins visible through the persistent heavy rain.
